description: CompositionMulti-hued check shorts, has two side pockets, two patch pockets at the back, stitch detailing, comfortable waistband with belt loops and buttoned and zipped closure frontFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach, or wringTumble dry lowDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsFor a practical look which won't distract him from play, choose these shorts - perfect for active boys. For a comfortable outfit, team this with a T-shirt and sandals.
